title: Pin language and tool versions for the project
description: Declare exact runtime and tooling versions in a version file so every developer and CI uses the same toolchain rather than whatever is on PATH.
body: Use when a project depends on a specific language runtime or build tool. Do not rely on each developer's globally-installed version, and avoid 'works on my machine' drift from mismatched runtimes. Actions: add a version file (.nvmrc/.tool-versions/engines field or equivalent), document the version manager, and have bootstrap verify the active version matches; record the required versions. Validation signals include a version check in bootstrap/CI that fails on mismatch and reproducible installs across machines. Risk boundary: a version skew between local and CI can mask bugs until deploy; flag and align the toolchain rather than ignoring a mismatch warning.
